mechanism: The central bank reaction function (φ_π) determines whether supply shocks are accommodated (positive correlation) or offset (negative correlation). φ_π > 1.5 ensures determinacy and demand-shock dominance of the correlation
regime_dependence: φ_π < 1 always produces positive correlation; φ_π > 1.5 allows shock type to determine sign; 1.0-1.5 is the transition zone
